title: Sign in to access the dashboard
description: Verifies a staff user can log in with valid credentials and lands on the dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Access dashboard after signing in
description: Verifies that a staff user can sign in and reach the dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Navigate from dashboard to Athletes via sidebar
description: Verifies a logged-in user can reach Athletes management from the dashboard using the primary navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Use the sidebar to open the Athletes area
Verify the Athletes management page is displayed

title: Create a new athlete and see it in the list
description: Verifies a staff user can add a new athlete and the athlete appears in the athletes list in the current session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Use the sidebar to open the Athletes area
Start adding a new athlete
Fill Test Athlete Alpha into the athlete name field
Submit the new athlete form
Verify the new athlete appears in the athletes list

title: Create, edit, and delete a coach from the list
description: Verifies that a staff user can add a coach, update that coach, and remove the coach from the list in the same session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the sidebar link to manage coaches
Start adding a new coach
Fill a valid name into the coach name field
Fill a valid email into the coach email field
Submit the new coach
Open the newly created coach for editing
Update the coach name field with a different valid name
Save the coach changes
Select the edited coach for deletion
Confirm the deletion
Verify the deleted coach no longer appears in the coaches list

title: Create, edit, and delete a class template from the list
description: Verifies that a staff user can create a class template, modify its details, and delete it from the templates list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the sidebar link to manage class templates
Start creating a new class template
Fill a valid class name into the class name field
Select a valid duration for the class
Fill a short description into the class description field
Submit the new class template
Open the newly created class template for editing
Update the class description field with different text
Save the class template changes
Select the edited class template for deletion
Confirm the deletion
Verify the deleted class template no longer appears in the class templates list

title: Navigate from dashboard to Classes via sidebar
description: Verifies a logged-in user can reach Class templates from the dashboard using the primary navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Use the sidebar to open the Classes area
Verify the Class templates management page is displayed

title: Edit an existing athlete and see updated details in the list
description: Verifies a staff user can edit an athlete and the updated athlete details are shown in the athletes list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Use the sidebar to open the Athletes area
Start adding a new athlete
Fill Test Athlete Beta into the athlete name field
Submit the new athlete form
Open the athlete record for Test Athlete Beta to edit
Fill Test Athlete Beta Updated into the athlete name field
Save the athlete changes
Verify the athletes list shows Test Athlete Beta Updated

title: Inspect scheduled classes while navigating between dates
description: Verifies that a staff user can move between calendar dates and see the scheduled classes update for the selected date.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the sidebar link to open the calendar
Navigate to a different date in the calendar
Verify scheduled classes are displayed for the selected date

title: Create a support ticket from the tickets area
description: User creates a new support ticket and it appears in the tickets list with a visible status indicator.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the tickets area
Start creating a new ticket
Fill a subject into the ticket subject field
Fill a description into the ticket description field
Submit the ticket form
Verify the newly created ticket is displayed in the tickets list with a visible status

title: Delete an athlete and confirm it is removed from the list
description: Verifies a staff user can delete an athlete and the athlete no longer appears in the athletes list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Use the sidebar to open the Athletes area
Start adding a new athlete
Fill Test Athlete Gamma into the athlete name field
Submit the new athlete form
Select the athlete record for Test Athlete Gamma to delete
Confirm the deletion
Verify Test Athlete Gamma is not shown in the athletes list

title: Switch to week view and inspect classes across the week

Submit the login form

Verify the ticket details view is displayed and includes a visible ticket status

title: View settings and save an updated preference

Submit the login form

Modify a settings option to a different valid value

Verify a saved confirmation or updated setting state is visible

title: Cancel coach deletion keeps coach in the list

title: Show an error on invalid login credentials
description: Verifies submitting invalid credentials shows a visible login error and the user is not signed in.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill invalid-user@example.com into the email field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid credentials error is visible
